agentSummary.headline: 4 critical items need attention before end of day
agentSummary.summary: The AI agent has analyzed your logistics data and identified 4 import orders aging beyond 48 hours, 2 orders awaiting customs clearance, and 2 SKUs below safety stock. Vehicle fill rate (71.3%) is below the 75–85% target — consider consolidating Primary (Khavda) shipments. OTIF at 82.5% is acceptable but trending down from last week.

recommendedActions.title: Expedite customs clearance for IMP-2026-089
recommendedActions.reasoning: Solar modules (2,400 units) aging 96 hours. Awaiting clearance at Hazira. Risk of demurrage if not cleared within 24h.
recommendedActions.suggestedAction: Contact CHA for status; verify HS code submission.

recommendedActions.title: Prioritize IMP-2026-086 for Khavda dispatch
recommendedActions.reasoning: 3,600 solar modules cleared at port, aging 120 hours. Target Khavda-Staging-A. High priority — project timeline at risk.

recommendedActions.title: Consolidate Primary (Khavda) shipments
recommendedActions.reasoning: Vehicle fill rate 71.3% vs 75–85% target. 12 Primary shipments this week — 3 could be consolidated into 2.
recommendedActions.suggestedAction: Review STO-088, STO-085, STO-087 for same-day consolidation.

recommendedActions.title: Expedite TRACKER-HSA inbound
recommendedActions.reasoning: 1,200 units on hand vs 1,500 safety stock. 800 inbound expected. Khavda project consuming 200/day.
recommendedActions.suggestedAction: Verify IMP-2026-085 ETD; consider air freight for partial if critical.

recommendedActions.title: Rebalance KHAVDA-STAGING-B capacity
recommendedActions.reasoning: 57.5% utilisation vs KHAVDA-STAGING-A at 78%. Wind blade delivery (IMP-2026-087) inbound — consider pre-allocating space.
recommendedActions.suggestedAction: Reserve 50 pallets for OOG wind components.

agentInsights.insight: Vehicle fill rate at 71.3% is below the 75–85% target. Primary (Khavda) leg has the lowest utilisation — consolidation opportunity.
2 import orders (IMP-2026-089, IMP-2026-088) awaiting customs clearance. Combined 2,448 units at risk of demurrage.
SOLAR-545W-BIFACIAL and TRACKER-HSA below safety stock. Inbound covers 60% of gap — monitor daily.
OTIF at 82.5% — within acceptable range but down 2.1pp from last week. Import leg delays contributing.
Import (Port) leg has highest freight cost per shipment (₹2.37L avg). Consider multi-carrier negotiation for next quarter.

conversationalQueries.query: Which import orders need my attention?
conversationalQueries.response: 4 import orders need attention: IMP-2026-089 (96h aging, awaiting customs), IMP-2026-086 (120h aging, cleared), IMP-2026-087 (72h, cleared), IMP-2026-088 (72h, awaiting customs). I recommend prioritizing IMP-2026-086 for immediate dispatch and IMP-2026-089 for customs follow-up.

conversationalQueries.query: Why is vehicle fill rate low?
conversationalQueries.response: Vehicle fill rate is 71.3% (target 75–85%). The Primary (Khavda) leg has 12 shipments with sub-optimal consolidation. I've identified 3 shipments (STO-088, STO-085, STO-087) that could be consolidated into 2 — estimated 15% freight savings.
2 orders awaiting clearance: IMP-2026-089 (solar modules, 2,400 units) and IMP-2026-088 (inverters, 48 units). Both at Hazira. IMP-2026-086 and IMP-2026-087 are cleared. IMP-2026-085 is in transit.

2 SKUs below safety stock: SOLAR-545W-BIFACIAL (18,500 vs 20,000 target; 12,000 inbound) and TRACKER-HSA (1,200 vs 1,500 target; 800 inbound). At current consumption, TRACKER-HSA may stock out in 4–5 days if inbound delays.

4 critical items: 4 import orders aging >48h, 2 awaiting customs, 2 SKUs below safety. OTIF 82.5%, fill rate 71.3% (below target). Top action: expedite IMP-2026-086 dispatch and IMP-2026-089 customs clearance.

agentCapabilities.description: Agent continuously monitors data and surfaces critical items before they escalate
Prioritized actions with reasoning and estimated impact — human approves, agent proposes
Ask in natural language — 'Which orders need attention?' — get instant, data-backed answers
Correlates transportation, customs, inventory — not siloed dashboards
